publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-08-19 18:20:35 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Properties Management Department

did.physdesc: Research, course material, specification files, architectural plans.
did.abstract: Curriculum review reports, consulting files, specifications and estimates for the Statler Hall, research studies, Statler design studios files, and course materials for Properties Management courses at Cornell, including 20 architectural drawings of the Statler Hotel.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Curriculum review reports, consulting files, specifications and estimates for the Statler Hall, research studies, Statler design studios files, and course materials for Properties Management courses at Cornell, including 20 architectural drawings of the Statler Hotel.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Properties Management Department Records, #28-2-2405. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Series I. Curriculum Review - Reports by Various Individuals
An Analysis of Survey Data Bases by Organizational Analysis & Practice (OAP)
Update on Curriculum Review for Triad
Trends in the Use of Computer Technology by Alvarez & Ziegler
Future Trends in Education by Antoinette Colucci
Survey Instruments for Curriculum Review Task Force
Analysis of Curricula From Hospitality or Business Schools
Documentation of SHA's Undergrad & MPS Applicant Pools by Reed Fisher
A Documentation on the Structure of The Hospitality Industry by Carolyn Troiano
The Hospitality Industry in a Time of Fundamental Change by Alan K. McAdams
Analysis of Results of Institutional Goals Inventory
A Report on Responses to the "In Search of Excellence" Exercise
Report for Curriculum Review by Clarkson, West, and Zoffer
Appendix A - Institutional Goal Survey Results Arranged by Item Numbers
Appendix B - Institutional Goal Survey Results Arranged by Goal Area Categories
Computer Print Out of Results of CRTF (Curriculum Review Task Force)
Review: The General Managers by John Kotter
Summaries of Meetings With Task Force
Letter to Frederick Mosser, Quality Inns
Memo July 5, 1983 to Dean Clark with excerpt from University Goals, Gross, 1968
Task Force Meeting with George Milkovich
Meeting June 2 & June 3 with McAdams, Edmonston & Milkovich
Letter April 27, 1984 to Ian Ferguson of Marriott Corp.
SHA Faculty Plan for Curriculum Study
Update on Curriculum Review Process for SHA Faculty
Letters re compensation for Larry Williams
Presentation on Curriculum process to SHA alumni
Effective Communication In The Hospitality Industry by Daphne A. Jameson presented to the World Hospitality Congress II, Boston, MA
Drafts, letters, etc. pertaining to American Hotel Foundation proposal
Curriculum Review report from the Florida State University
Miscellaneous notes, letters, clippings re CR process
Getting To Yes by Roger Fisher & William Ury
An Analysis of the workforce of the Hospitality Industry 1980-1990 by OAP
Past, Present and Future Trends in the Foodservice Industry by Hart, Livingston & Spizizen
Financing The Lodging Industry by L&H
Time to go back to the true basics & Colleges beset by a double crunch
American Students Score Average or Below in International Math Exams
Wharton's New Ways: Striving to be No. 1
Triad/Marketing Commercial Report for Dean Beck
Research Survey November, 1982 to CHRIE members to assess educational skills and competencies needed by hospitality managers
Workshop on Building & Property Management of CMAA
Summary of First Round Responses of Delphi Study
The Hotel Monthly, August 1950, "The Story of Statler Hall"
Plumbing In Hotels by F. H. Randolph
Plumbing In Hotels by F. H. Randolph
H. B. Callis - Memo HLP & RM Costs
H. B. Callis - Memo HLP & RM Costs NYC, St. Louis, Washington
Series III. Statler Hotel Specs & Estimates
Power Center for Statler Auditorium-Instruction Book from Buffalo Electric
Statler Hall Instructions to Bidders on Kitchen Equip. & Heating/Air Conditioning
Specifications for Entire Work Statler Auditorium & Addition to Statler Hall - General Work
Lockwood Hdwe. Schedule for Statler Hall
Specifications for Entire Work - Mechanical & Electrical Volume II
Institut International de Gilon, Switzerland (F 78) JJC
Central On-Line Data Processing for a Group of Hotels
Value Guide Survey 1969 - A Report to the Jamaica Tourist Board
A Guide for the Training of Food Managers of Licensed Fallout Shelters
Food Service Procedures in Fallout Shelters
Survey of Current Trends in Guest Room Design for Hotel & Motor Inn Facilities
Coding System Based on Uniform System of Accounts
The Management of Foods in Licensed Shelters
Specifications for Bar Equipment- Corning Hilton Inn
Housing Project Management - NCHP Phase II
Housing Project Management - NCHP Phase II Part 2 of 3
Standard Facility Requirements - Dept. of Air Force
A Study of Resort Hotel Operations by James H. Barrett
Modern Design Criteria for Profitable Hotels by Paul Broten
Wall Covering and Carpet - R.A. Compton
Hotel Computer Usage by Richard A. Compton
Management System for Hotels by Richard A. Compton
Interior Wall Covering Materials by Richard A. Compton
CMAA Workshop by Richard A. Compton & Paul Broten
First Exploratory Conference on Research in Fields Related to the Operation of Hotels
Front Office Accounting by Charles Sayles & Richard Compton
Ready Food for Commercial Use by Charles Sayles
Applications of Electronic Computing by Charles Sayles
New Food Techniques by Charles Sayles
Data Processing of Hotel Payrolls by Charles Sayles
The Washington Hilton Guest Room Furnishings
Hotel Statler Floor Plans of Various Properties
